facts.statement: Risk declines monotonically as lower-confidence predictions are abstained, with operating points marked at 80% coverage for each model.
At the target risk threshold, the foundation model retains 82% coverage compared with 66% for the hybrid GNN and 52% for the CNN baseline.

design_notes: Show the full coverage-risk tradeoff rather than only a chosen abstention threshold.
Mark operating points directly so selective prediction choices remain auditable.
Pair risk reduction with retained coverage so safety-oriented behavior is not confused with simply rejecting most samples.
